name: ExtensionPackagedProductDefinition_MarketingStatus
title: R5: Allows specifying that an item is on the market for sale, or that it is not available, and the dates and locations associated (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `PackagedProductDefinition.marketingStatus` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`PackagedProductDefinition.marketingStatus` 0..* `MarketingStatus`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `PackagedProductDefinition.marketingStatus` 0..* `MarketingStatus`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `PackagedProductDefinition.marketingStatus` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `PackagedProductDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `PackagedProductDefinition.marketingStatus` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Allows specifying that an item is on the market for sale, or that it is not available, and the dates and locations associated (new)

element.short: DataType slice for a FHIR R5 `MarketingStatus` value
element.definition: Slice to indicate the presence of a R5 `MarketingStatus` in FHIR R4

element.short: R5: The country in which the marketing authorization has been granted shall be specified It should be specified using the ISO 3166 ‑ 1 alpha-2 code elements
element.comment: Element `MarketingStatus.country` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MarketingStatus.country` as `Equivalent`.
element.requirements: Element `MarketingStatus.country` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MarketingStatus.country` as `Equivalent`.

element.short: The country in which the marketing authorization has been granted shall be specified It should be specified using the ISO 3166 ‑ 1 alpha-2 code elements
element.definition: The country in which the marketing authorization has been granted shall be specified It should be specified using the ISO 3166 ‑ 1 alpha-2 code elements.

element.short: R5: Where a Medicines Regulatory Agency has granted a marketing authorization for which specific provisions within a jurisdiction apply, the jurisdiction can be specified using an appropriate controlled terminology The controlled term and the controlled term identifier shall be specified
element.comment: Element `MarketingStatus.jurisdiction` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MarketingStatus.jurisdiction` as `Equivalent`.
element.requirements: Element `MarketingStatus.jurisdiction` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MarketingStatus.jurisdiction` as `Equivalent`.

element.definition: Where a Medicines Regulatory Agency has granted a marketing authorization for which specific provisions within a jurisdiction apply, the jurisdiction can be specified using an appropriate controlled terminology The controlled term and the controlled term identifier shall be specified.

element.requirements: Element `MarketingStatus.status` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MarketingStatus.status` as `Equivalent`.

element.short: This attribute provides information on the status of the marketing of the medicinal product See ISO/TS 20443 for more information and examples
element.definition: This attribute provides information on the status of the marketing of the medicinal product See ISO/TS 20443 for more information and examples.

element.short: R5: The date when the Medicinal Product is placed on the market by the Marketing Authorization Holder (or where applicable, the manufacturer/distributor) in a country and/or jurisdiction shall be provided A complete date consisting of day, month and year shall be specified using the ISO 8601 date format NOTE “Placed on the market” refers to the release of the Medicinal Product into the distribution chain

element.requirements: Element `MarketingStatus.dateRange` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MarketingStatus.dateRange` as `Equivalent`.
